description: Use this API to add or modify all OPF bus load data records in a specified subsystem of the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_load_subsys(sid, all, intgar)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem id from 0 to 11. a subsystem must have been previously defined. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; no default allowed).

all.description: process all buses, use existing data values.
process all buses, use default data values.

intgar.description: bus load table cross reference number (default value of 0, current value otherwise, by default).
indicates which bus types should be processed (default treatment same as value of 0 by default).
only Type 2 and 3 buses in subsystem.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
